name: Fran,s Potatoe Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add Smokey-links and sauté until browned.
3. Add celery and onion; cook until vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in Cream of Celery Soup, Cheese Whiz, and Milk.
5. Add diced potatoes and simmer for at least 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. The longer the soup simmers, the better it will taste.
